title: mandevilla thevetioides
intro: Mandevilla thevetioides, also known as thevetia or yellow oleander, is a tropical plant native to Central and South America, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Its leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include cardiotonic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant is known for its various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Mandevilla thevetioides include tinctures, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat a range of ailments, although it is essential to use them under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
